text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: You want me to run with Flash again? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask Mr. C.B. for a rematch immediately after
getting back from our trip, but...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
It might've been fun right after the Derby, but I
dunno...
choice_data_list: There's a lot more to her now.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Oh? You seem really sure about that.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
All right, then let me see what she's got—right
now!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Let's run a 2,400-meter left-handed
race again, like we did before.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Sounds good. I'm ready when you are.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I would like your advice.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I haven't been able to visualize myself winning
ever since this rematch was decided.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Um... Trainer?
choice_data_list:
But you've turned setbacks into successes
plenty of times before.

But you've turned setbacks into successes
plenty of times before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Losing to Mr. C.B. last time was what awakened
her desire to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That loss propelled her into chasing her goal in
full earnestness and getting results from it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a way, the Kikuka Sho was a setback too. That
experience helped her learn how to keep looking
forward and allowed her to take on strong
opponents at the Japan Cup and Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's grown and learned a lot through her failures
while pursuing her idea of perfection.
choice_data_list: I'm so proud of who you've come to be.
I'm so proud of who you've come to be.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list:
You've put in more work than anyone. Have
faith in yourself.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I think you should just go for it and do
what you want! ♪ I know you can accomplish
anything you set your mind to!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I still feel as though I will lose... that the tables
will turn on me in the final hundred meters...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However... I believe that, as I am now... I can turn
the tables back in the last ten meters.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Are you ready? Should we get started?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Oh? Seems like I've got your attention today.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huff!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(Focus on the race in front of me... and just run...
like always!)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I believe... in me!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(Huh? My legs feel light, and I can see Mr. C.B.'s
movements perfectly...)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: (I can do this!)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Whew... Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
That was too close... I thought you were going to
get away!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You still managed to catch up to me, but...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
You used your final spurt at the exact right
timing. You did great!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Whew, I haven't had this kind of rush in forever.
That was fun!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Watching the younger generation grow and
improve sure does warm the heart...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Let's do this again! But in a real race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After saying goodbye to Mr. C.B...
choice_data_list:
Looks like sticking to the schedule was the right
move.

Looks like sticking to the schedule was the right
move.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I... I had lost sight of myself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was scared, and I didn't trust the hard work and
progress I'd built up till now...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I tried to make myself sound noble by saying I
was being flexible, but in the end, all I was doing
was running away from my fear.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My legs felt light as a feather today, even though
they felt heavy as mud before.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Your words gave me the power to step forward.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've... I've grown and gotten stronger. The
accumulation of my hard work has paid off.
choice_data_list:
And there's no weapon more powerful than hard
work!

And there's no weapon more powerful than hard
work!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? If... If I hadn't made any changes to my
schedule at all...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I still would have been able to make
my parents proud?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...You have presented me solid, convincing
evidence rather than vague, philosophical
arguments.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I have no choice but to believe in
you... and myself for coming this far.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...I will!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I shall rise to the challenge, no matter my
opponent or how formidable they are!
